remarks: Welcome to 26 Rowan Street, Apt. 1 in Norwalk, CT! This beautifully renovated 2-bedroom, 1-bath apartment offers approximately 900 sq. ft. of comfortable living space, featuring luxury trim throughout and modern finishes that make it feel like home.  Enjoy the convenience of first-floor living with off-street parking, basement storage, laundry hookups, and a lovely shared backyard perfect for relaxing outdoors. The owner pays for water, while the tenant is responsible for heat, hot water, gas, and electricity.  Conveniently located near shopping, restaurants, parks, public transportation, and major highways, this move-in-ready apartment offers the perfect blend of comfort and convenience.   The owner pays for water, while the tenant is responsible for heat, hot water, gas, and electricity. Agent owner.
